title: Financial System Survey highlights—2025
summary: The Bank of Canada published a summary of its 2025 Financial System Survey on May 8, 2025, based on a survey conducted February 10–28. However, this source record captures only the publication metadata and brief description, not the actual survey results, respondent data, or risk assessments. The full survey content must be obtained separately.
key_points: Survey conducted February 10–28, 2025, with results published May 8, 2025
Includes a special section on scenarios that could cause severe repricing in financial markets near term
Source is the Bank of Canada, a high-trust-tier domain
Actual survey data, respondent views, and quantitative findings are not included in this source record
Published approximately 10 months before the reference date (2026-03-31)
why_it_matters: Financial System Surveys can capture professional views on systemic risks and market vulnerabilities, but this record contains only metadata. It cannot inform macro catalyst analysis or investment decisions without the actual survey findings.

issues_found: Source is a publication listing/index page, not the actual Financial System Survey document with results
Source body contains only metadata and a one-sentence description — no actual survey findings, respondent data, or risk assessments
Record correctly identifies lack of substantive content but still submitted for review
Cannot support macro catalyst research without actual survey data (e.g., respondent percentages, risk severity ratings)
Published May 8, 2025 — approximately 10 months before TODAY, making the thin content even more problematic

human_review.notes: Source is a container/listing page capturing only metadata. The actual 2025 Financial System Survey PDF or detailed results page with respondent views and quantitative findings is not present. This record has no research value as-is.

notes: Content is extremely thin — this appears to be a crawl record of the publication index page rather than the actual survey publication. The record only contains the publication date, survey field period, and a one-sentence description of the special topic. Actual survey findings (e.g., percentage of respondents identifying specific risks, perceived severity of scenarios) are absent. Should be flagged for human review to determine if full content exists elsewhere or if this source should be superseded.
